{{nihongo|'''Wokatano Shrine'''|岡太神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Settsu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Wokatano Shrine'''|岡太神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Settsu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Wokatano Shrine'''|岡太神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Settsu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Wokatano Shrine'''|岡太神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Settsu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Wokatano Shrine'''|岡太神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Settsu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Wokatano Shrine'''|岡太神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Settsu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Wokatano Shrine'''|岡太神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Settsu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Wokatano Shrine'''|岡太神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Settsu Province]].
